steps.title: Identify the explanatory relationship
steps.content: The passage opens with van Berlo et al.'s finding—advergames may not facilitate brand recall—then immediately pivots with “This phenomenon can be explained by” Lang's limited capacity model. The strongest signal is this explicit connection: Lang's model explains van Berlo's finding.

steps.title: Match both parts of the main idea
steps.content:
Choice A states that Lang's model provides a means of explaining van Berlo's finding—exactly what the passage does.

The other three either omit the explanatory framework, reverse the relationship between the researchers, or contradict the passage's conclusion.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
